triLM.granularity: component-level: attention & MLP sublayer residual writes + token embedding (the §3.16 node set). 'top_edges' is this component ranking, NOT upstream->downstream edge patching.

heads.note: per-head o_proj decomposition is coupling-limited (residual 0.053 >= 0.05) on this activation-quantized model; strong name-movers (effect >> coupling) are robust, marginal heads unreliable — node-level map is unaffected.

floatLM.granularity: component-level: attention & MLP sublayer residual writes + token embedding (the §3.16 node set). 'top_edges' is this component ranking, NOT upstream->downstream edge patching.

heads.note: per-head o_proj decomposition is coupling-limited (residual 0.057 >= 0.05) on this activation-quantized model; strong name-movers (effect >> coupling) are robust, marginal heads unreliable — node-level map is unaffected.

overlap.interpretation: high Spearman/Jaccard on components + matching name-mover / S-inhibition heads => the ternary twin preserves the FP IOI circuit (same-data twins remove the model-identity confound). The node/component comparison is confound-free regardless; the HEAD-level comparison is reliable only when heads_comparison_reliable=True (both twins pass the per-head o_proj coupling test) — else trust the component-level result.

reads.confound_removed: Spectra twins share training data + architecture + tokenizer, so any circuit difference is attributable to the ternary-vs-FP weight substrate, not to model identity. This is the real-scale replacement for Paper-A's 512-dim toy twin (caveat #1).
reads.node_level_headline: The component/node comparison (overlap.component_ranking: Spearman/Jaccard on robust=necessity∩sufficiency + EAP-IG) is CONFOUND-FREE and reliable regardless of the head test.
reads.head_level_validity: The per-head name-mover / S-inhibition comparison is reliable ONLY if heads_comparison_reliable=True (both twins pass the per-head o_proj coupling self-test). These Unpacked/FP twins are dense bias-free Linear (no activation quantization coupling the head slices), so the residual is EXPECTED ~0 and this flag EXPECTED True — but the run MEASURES and stamps it; do not assume. Current run: heads_comparison_reliable=False.
reads.granularity_caveat: EAP-IG here is NODE/COMPONENT level (each layer's attention & MLP residual write + embedding), NOT upstream->downstream EDGE patching. 'top_edges' is that component ranking. Conclusions are about which components matter, not the wiring between them.
